title: UK Seeks to Cut Carbon Costs For Oil Refineries After Closures
description: The UK government is drawing up a strategy to protect its remaining oil refineries from rising carbon prices, after two sites closed.
content: The UK government is drawing up a strategy to protect its remaining oil refineries from rising carbon prices, after two sites closed.
